claim: Silverstein has publicly stated in multiple interviews that on the morning of September 11, 2001 he was at a dermatologist appointment at his wife's insistence, missing his customary breakfast meeting at Windows on the World atop WTC 1.

sources.label: Times of Israel — “Larry Silverstein: I decided to rebuild World Trade Center just 2 days post-9/11”
Wikipedia — Larry Silverstein
sources.quote: his wife insisted he attend a medical appointment

sources.label: Haley Press / @strategichaley, Instagram reel DVOtv6QCTFf (Feb 26, 2026) — surfacing source

notes: Silverstein's dermatologist-appointment account has been told by him in multiple interviews over the years; not a contested fact but an autobiographical claim by him. Cited here as a public statement by Silverstein, not as independent corroboration of his location. Primary would be a video interview where he says it; pending.
